description: Canonical ruflo-native stack inventory for D11 gap-fit / marginal-lift scoring. A candidate is judged on whether it fills a NAMED gap, ENHANCES an existing layer, or DUPLICATES installed capability. Source of truth for the objective-relevance gate (decision.mjs). Grounded in sota-runtime memory: sota-ecosystem-scope-decision + ruflo-vs-native-workflows-verdict.

orchestration.note: native dynamic workflows REPLACE ruflo claude-flow orchestration (convergence verdict 2026-05-28); do not install competing orchestrators

gaps.desc: repo-specific eval/measurement harness (retrieval-hit evals + token/cost traces + Windows stability tests). Convergence verdict: BUILD, not install — no single repo fills it; assemble from promptfoo+deepeval+langfuse patterns.
dedicated LLM tracing / dashboard / trajectory visualization. Native otel hooks exist but no dashboard. langfuse is the deferred candidate (OTEL-native, TS).
head-to-head retrieval eval to validate agentdb ~= mem0 before claiming parity (deep-audit-backlog #6). mem0 = measure-against baseline, not a replacement.

policy.doctrine: install-not-build for genuine gaps; validate-through-use for external frameworks; do NOT bulk-install redundant/cross-language frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI/AutoGen/Mem0/Qdrant/LiteLLM) — redundant with native, mostly Python.
